$schema: Drives the non-deletion invariant (NEW DOES NOT CANCEL OLD). Every classic mind-map branch and every ATT&CK Enterprise tactic must resolve to >=1 seam in seams.json, or be explicitly logged honest-na here. validate.ts fails the build if any classic technique is silently dropped. honest_na_cells declare permanent matrix (principal x tactic) blanks so the typing test never renders a plain blank.

branch_honest_na.reason: Reporting is the red-team operator's own deliverable phase. It violates no victim trust relationship, so it has no seam. Drawn honest-na deliberately, not left blank.

honest_na_cells.reason: Active Directory has no command-and-control channel of its own; C2 rides the host/network. Permanent honest-na.
AD is not an egress; exfiltration leaves via host/network, not the directory service. Permanent.
A passive retrieval index does not beacon. C2 that abuses it is modeled as memory-as-dead-drop on the agent, not the store. Permanent.
An index has no destructive impact surface of its own; impact lands on the agent/host it feeds. Permanent.
A document is an ingress conduit, not a control channel. Permanent.
A file conduit holds no credentials to access; credential access targets stores, not the conduit. Permanent.
The messaging conduit carries impact payloads but is not itself the impacted resource. Permanent.
The fetch conduit is a delivery/ingress surface, not a destruction target. Permanent.
